use_codes.desc: WHEN PATIENTS ARE UNABLE TO TAKE THE ORAL FORMULATIONS, PREVACID IV, FOR INJECTION IS INDICATED AS AN ALTERNATIVE FOR THE SHORT-TERM TREATMENT (UP TO 7 DAYS) OF ALL GRADES OF EROSIVE ESOPHAGITIS
